code: import React from'react';import{ForgeReconciler}from'@forge/bridge';import ForgeUI,{Form,Select,Option,TextField}from'@forge/ui';import App from'./App';import{HIGHLIGHT_LANGUAGES,HIGHLIGHT_THEMES}from'./languages';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Config=()=>{const onSubmit=async formData=>{return formData;};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Form,{onSubmit:onSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Select,{name:"language",label:"Language",defaultValue:"javascript",children:HIGHLIGHT_LANGUAGES.map(language=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Option,{label:language,value:language},language))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TextField,{name:"title",label:"Title",placeholder:"Optional title for your code block"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Select,{name:"theme",label:"Theme",defaultValue:"Github Gist",children:HIGHLIGHT_THEMES.map(theme=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Option,{label:theme,value:theme},theme))})]});};ForgeReconciler.render(/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(App,{}));ForgeReconciler.addConfig(/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Config,{}));
